channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Hyundai is closing in on Chevy as the #2 EV brand in the US
item.description: Hyundai is on track for its sixth straight year of record sales in the US. In the EV market, Hyundai has its sights set on Chevrolet as it looks to become the second-best-selling brand behind Tesla.

item.title: 4 Reasons to Think Twice Before Buying SpaceX Stock Right Now
item.description: If you're on the fence about diving into this name in the middle of the hype, this might help you sort out your decision.

item.title: Famed Venture Capital Fund Says this Stock is Like Buying Nvidia in 2023
item.description: When a Sequoia Capital partner compares a freshly public stock to NVIDIA (NASDAQ:NVDA) three years ago, investors pay attention. That is exactly what Sean MacGuire did on CNBC this week, arguing that “SpaceX right now is more like Nvidia three years ago than Tesla.” He went further on his persona...

item.title: Tesla: The SpaceX Optionality
Elon Musk could lose nearly $1 trillion and still be the world's richest person
item.description: Tuesday's spike in SpaceX stock boosted the fortune of the world's richest man by a cool $110 billion.

item.title: Tesla: The Recovery Is Just Another Illusion
Apple is developing the missing link for Tesla to get CarPlay: report
item.description: A new report claims that Apple is in the process of developing what would be the missing link for Tesla to get CarPlay. Apple and Tesla have been reportedly working together for some time to give Tesla owners the opportunity to utilize CarPlay within their vehicles. While many owners are more tha...

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Stock Gets Fair Value Bump As Analysts Debate AI And Demand
item.description: Tesla now carries an updated fair value estimate of about US$420.55 per share, up from roughly US$415.30, a modest shift that still matters if you are tracking long term assumptions. The change sits against a split analyst backdrop, with some pointing to autonomy and physical AI to justify higher...

item.title: The Mag 7 plus these three AI companies make up the new Fab 10
item.description: The Magnificent Seven plus SpaceX (SPCX), Anthropic (ANTH.PVT), and OpenAI (OPAI.PVT) equal the Fab 10. Could this trio of AI mega-IPOs bring enthusiasm back to the tech space previously dominated by the Mag 7? Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Ines Ferré and Innovator From Goldman Sachs Asset Manage...

item.title: SpaceX Launches Start of Acquisition Spree with Cursor After Historic IPO
item.description: The market has spent years viewing SpaceX (NASDAQ:SPCX) primarily as a rocket company, but that narrative no longer fits. The company’s historic IPO, which raised $85.7 billion after underwriters exercised the so-called “greenshoe” overallotment — with the stock currently valued at more than $2.7...

item.title: Cathie Wood's ARKK Cuts BMNR Stake On Bitmine's Holdings Pop, Joins Trims Of Roku, Tesla, AMD In No-Buy Monday
item.description: Sister funds ARKQ and ARKX reported only sales on Monday, with no buys across the three Wood-managed ETFs that traded.

item.title: Tesla Stock Traded Its Affordable Car Dream For An AI Moonshot
item.description: As the company's core auto business shrinks, management has gone quiet on its promise of cheaper EVs, betting everything on a future that's years away and will cost billions.

item.title: It Took SpaceX Just 1 Day to Reach a Milestone Tesla Has Never Achieved. Which Elon Musk-Led Stock Is the Better Buy in June?
item.description: SpaceX and Tesla are leading players in cutting-edge markets, which could make both growth stocks appealing to risk-tolerant investors.

item.title: SpaceX Jumps 14% Past $2.9 Trillion, Closes In on Microsoft, Apple After $60 Billion Cursor Deal
item.description: Shares of SpaceX (NASDAQ:SPCX) are up 14% in early trading Tuesday, zooming to $219. This pushes the newly public rocket and connectivity giant’s market cap past $2.9 trillion, putting SPCX stock within striking distance of the world’s biggest tech names. The trigger is a blockbuster acquisition ...

item.title: Tesla deliveries get a big boost in expectations from Wall Street
item.description: Tesla deliveries got a big boost in expectations from Wall Street firm Goldman Sachs, who believes the company will report some stronger-than-expected numbers when the second quarter comes to an end in the coming weeks. Goldman Sachs has raised its vehicle delivery forecast for Tesla ( NASDAQ: TS...

item.title: Elon Musk Just Made More Money in 6.5 Hours Than Warren Buffett Made in His Entire Life.
item.description: Yesterday handed Elon Musk one of the largest single-day wealth gains in recorded financial history. SpaceX shares ripped from $160.95 to $192.50, and Forbes’ real-time billionaires tracker put Musk’s one-day paper gain at $164.8 billion. Warren Buffett, who had his own “good day” with an estimat...

item.title: Tesla Stock Can’t Escape SpaceX’s Gravity
item.description: Investors will get new fundamental information for Tesla when it reports second quarter deliveries in early July.

item.title: Tesla ‘Robotaxis’ are not crashing because they are not running
item.description: Tesla didn’t report a single at-fault “Robotaxi” crash in the latest NHTSA autonomous-vehicle data — its only fresh incident was a Model Y getting rear-ended while stopped, clearly the other driver’s fault. That sounds like good news for Tesla’s safety record. But live fleet data points to the re...

item.title: SpaceX makes first acquisition post-IPO with coding leader Cursor
item.description: SpaceX has exercised its option to acquire Cursor, the innovative AI coding company, in an all-stock transaction valued at $60 billion. The deal, announced on June 16, marks a significant step in SpaceX’s expansion into advanced artificial intelligence, building on months of close collaboration b...

item.title: SpaceX IPO: What Your $5,000 Investment Could Be Worth
item.description: The company's valuation prices in lofty growth expectations.

item.title: Ex-Tesla exec builds the home heat pump Tesla gave up for robots
item.description: Drew Baglino spent nearly two decades building Tesla’s batteries, motors, and power electronics. Now the former Tesla SVP is quietly building the one home energy product Tesla talked up for years and never shipped: a residential heat pump. His startup, Sadi Thermal Machines, is a direct bet on an...

item.title: Elon Musk Calls This "The Greatest Company in Europe"
item.description: On social media, Musk recently boasted about a tech giant in Europe, saying that it "should be treasured."

item.title: Price Prediction: How Much Upside Is Left in Tesla?
item.description: I’m going to put the verdict at the top. Our Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) work points to a stock trading right at fair value heading into the back half of 2026. The 24/7 Wall St.

item.title: Baidu Apollo Go wins Level 4 robotaxi approval in Switzerland as AmiGo
item.description: Baidu’s Apollo Go has received a Level 4 autonomous driving permit in Switzerland for AmiGo, a robotaxi service it is running with Swiss Post’s PostBus, putting the Chinese tech giant ahead of Waymo and Tesla in deploying driverless vehicles into European public transport. The Federal Roads Offic...

item.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX is already closing in on Microsoft's market cap and a big Apple milestone
item.description: SpaceX is close to overtaking Microsoft in its valuation.

item.title: Tesla Stock Falls as It Tries To Escape SpaceX’s Gravity
item.description: Investors will get new fundamental information for Tesla when it reports second quarter deliveries in early July.

item.title: Tesla Q2 deliveries "likely tracking ahead of consensus": Goldman
item.description: Investing.com -- Tesla's second-quarter vehicle deliveries are on pace to surpass market expectations, according to Goldman Sachs, which has raised its delivery forecast ahead of the update.

item.title: That Didn't Take Long: SpaceX Earned Its First Wall Street Sell Rating Less Than an Hour After Trading Began
item.description: SpaceX stock may plunge by up to 29% if this prognostication proves accurate.

item.title: Elon Musk Says He's Building a Chip '2-3x Better Than Nvidia' at 10% the Cost. Should Nvidia Investors Be Worried?
item.description: The trillionaire has pulled off seemingly impossible feats in the past. Could he do it again with a chip that beats Nvidia?

item.title: Nasdaq, S&P 500 Futures Catch Breath Ahead Of First Warsh-Led Fed Decision: Why SPCX, TSLA, RKLB, BABA, NVO, HOOD, STI Are Keeping Traders Hooked
item.description: Stocktwits data showed retail sentiment on SPY and QQQ has remained ‘bearish’ despite the recent rally.

item.title: Will FSD version quickly update in EU
item.description: As they do in the US? Meaning will the point versions in the (5) countries with approval follow with the same frequent as elsewhere? submitted by /u/sergedg [link] [comments]

item.title: 1 Analyst Puts the Odds of a Tesla and SpaceX Merger at 80%. Here's What That Would Mean for Tesla Investors.
item.description: What such a deal would actually hand the automaker's shareholders is less clear-cut than the headline odds suggest.

item.title: European Scrutiny Of Tesla FSD Data Puts Growth Story At Risk
item.description: Tesla is under scrutiny in Europe after regulators in Sweden and the Netherlands questioned safety data submitted for its Full Self-Driving system. Authorities argue Tesla relied on marketing driven metrics and comparisons that may not match real world FSD performance. Independent experts have al...

item.title: TSLA Stock Slides Overnight: Ross Gerber Calls Tesla 'Worthless' Without SpaceX Merger As Retail Bets Rise
item.description: Gerber also said Tesla does not own the "brains" behind its self-driving and robotics ambitions.

item.title: Why Robotaxis Will Struggle To Compete
item.description: First of all, compared to taxis and app-based ride-hailing vehicles (Uber and Lyft vehicles), robotaxis may end up competing very well and driving those human-driven options out of the market. However, there’s a huge difference between that limited market and the normal passenger car market. Many...

item.title: Tesla Cybercab Specs Are Public — But Questions Remain
item.description: Tesla Cybercab specs have been revealed via an EPA filing. It’s a 15-page document, but here are some of the key facts and figures: Battery Capacity: 326-volt system, 146 Ah — probably around 50 kWh energy storage capacity Electric Motor: 163 kW (219 hp), front-mounted AC permanent magnet motor C...

item.title: S&P 500, Nasdaq, Dow Futures Retreat After Rally Fueled By SpaceX, US-Iran Deal As Fed Meeting Looms: TSLA, PLAY, FISV In Focus
item.description: The Dow index jumped to a new all-time intraday high on Monday, while the Nasdaq jumped to its best close since the end of March.

item.title: SpaceX Market Cap Breaches $2.5 Trillion: Goes Past Tesla, TSMC And Broadcom
item.description: SpaceX stock jumped close to 20% on Monday, hitting a market cap of $2.52 trillion, outshining TSMC.

item.title: SpaceX Post-IPO: Something Big May Happen in 15 Days. Here's What It Means for You.
item.description: SpaceX just completed the largest IPO ever.

item.title: SpaceX Is Already One of the World's 10 Most Valuable Companies. Here's Where the Stock Could Go From Here.
item.description: The largest IPO in history left the rocket and satellite-internet company trading at a price that is simply difficult to justify.

item.title: SpaceX Surpassed Broadcom, Meta Platforms, and Tesla in Market Cap on Its IPO Day. Can It Take on Amazon's Market Cap Next?
item.description: The biggest IPO in history looks overvalued relative to its industry peers.

item.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Pops On Trump-Iran Deal; Elon Musk's SpaceX Rockets, Tesla Does This
item.description: The Dow Jones index jumps Monday with a U.S.-Iran peace agreement. SpaceX flies on the stock market today. An AI stock tests an entry.

item.title: Why Tesla Might Need to Merge With SpaceX Sooner Rather Than Later
item.description: Investors appear to have been losing interest in Tesla stock this year.

item.title: What SpaceX's $1.2 billion bitcoin holdings mean for investors
item.description: Scott Melker discusses SpaceX (SPCX) IPO and examines the company's growing bitcoin holdings. The space giant now owns roughly 19,000 bitcoin (BTC-USD), valued at roughly $1.2 billion. "The Daily Wolf with Scott Melker" airs every day at 12:00 p.m.

item.title: Tesla FSD Data Faces EU Scrutiny
item.description: Tesla reportedly gave European regulators self-published FSD safety data.

item.title: Elon Musk Needs ASML for Terafab. You Don’t Need ASML Stock in Your Portfolio.
item.description: Elon Musk’s Terafab ambitions highlight ASML’s critical role in advanced chip manufacturing, but investors must decide whether the company’s strong AI-driven growth prospects still justify its elevated valuation.

item.title: Cathie Wood Buys $444 Million in SpaceX, Dumps Tesla and AMD
item.description: Cathie Wood Dumps Tesla. Her New Favorite Is SpaceX

item.title: Full Tesla Cybercab Specs: EPA Documents Confirm Battery Size, Weight, Power, And Preliminary Range
item.description: The first front-wheel-drive Tesla will weigh way less than a Model 3 but still offer plenty of range.

item.title: Tesla Cybercab specs revealed: range, curb weight, range ratings, and more
item.description: Tesla’s Cybercab has taken a significant step toward production with new technical details emerging from 2026 EPA certification documents. The filings, which include a Certificate of Conformity issued in late May , provide the most comprehensive public look yet at the purpose-built autonomous veh...

item.title: Elon Musk warns America will ‘1,000%’ go bankrupt. Now he’s the world’s 1st trillionaire
item.description: By some metrics, Musk even has iconic oil tycoon John D. Rockefeller beat.
